Class KeYUserProblemFile

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.KeYFile
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.KeYUserProblemFile
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProofOblInput, EnvInput
public final class KeYUserProblemFile extends KeYFile implements ProofOblInput
Represents an input from a .key user problem file producing an environment as well as a proof obligation.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class KeYFile

    file, initConfig, monitor

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    KeYUserProblemFile(String name, Path file, FileRepo fileRepo, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, boolean compressed)
    Instantiates a new user problem file.
    KeYUserProblemFile(String name, Path file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile)
    Creates a new representation of a KeYUserFile with the given name, a rule source representing the physical source of the input, and a graphical representation to call back in order to report the progress while reading.
    KeYUserProblemFile(String name, Path file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, boolean compressed)
    Instantiates a new user problem file.

  • Constructor Details

    • KeYUserProblemFile

      public KeYUserProblemFile(String name, Path file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile)
      Creates a new representation of a KeYUserFile with the given name, a rule source representing the physical source of the input, and a graphical representation to call back in order to report the progress while reading.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the file
      file - the file to read from
      monitor - the possibly null monitor for progress
      profile - the KeY profile under which to load

    • KeYUserProblemFile

      public KeYUserProblemFile(String name, Path file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, boolean compressed)
      Instantiates a new user problem file.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the file
      file - the file to read from
      monitor - the possibly null monitor for progress
      profile - the KeY profile under which to load
      compressed - true iff the file is compressed

    • KeYUserProblemFile

      public KeYUserProblemFile(String name, Path file, FileRepo fileRepo, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, boolean compressed)
      Instantiates a new user problem file.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the file
      file - the file tp read from
      fileRepo - the fileRepo which will store the file
      monitor - the possibly null monitor for progress
      profile - the KeY profile under which to load
      compressed - true iff the file is compressed

  • Method Details

    • read

      public ImmutableSet<PositionedString> read() throws ProofInputException
      Description copied from interface: EnvInput
      Reads the input using the given modification strategy, i.e., parts of the input do not modify the initial configuration while others do.
      Specified by:
      read in interface EnvInput
      Overrides:
      read in class KeYFile
      Returns:
      The found warnings or an empty ImmutableSet if no warnings occurred.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

      public void readProblem() throws ProofInputException

      Throws:

    • getPO

      public ProofAggregate getPO()
      Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
      Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input. If there is still no input available because nothing has been read yet null is returned.
      Specified by:
      getPO in interface ProofOblInput

    • implies

      public boolean implies(ProofOblInput po)
      Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
      If true, then this PO implies the passed one.
      Specified by:
      implies in interface ProofOblInput
